zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibylle de Vivonne於1220年出生在英國諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞時，她的父親Hugh de Vivonne26歲，母親Mabel Malet25歲。她與Anselm de Gournay在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1316年在英國戴文波福 特蕾西享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibylle de Vivonne于1220年出生在英国諾福爾可威爾斯 可特 馮 澤亞时，她的父亲Hugh de Vivonne26岁，母亲Mabel Malet25岁。她与Anselm de Gournay在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1316年在英国戴文波福 特蕾西享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sibylle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alain, Etienne, Jean-Michael.
French: from the female personal name Sibille, from Greek Sibylla (see Sibley ).

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibylle de Vivonne was born in 1220, in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England, her father, Hugh de Vivonne, was 26 and her mother, Mabel Malet, was 25. She married Anselm de Gournay in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1316, in Bovey Tracey, Devon, England, at the age of 96.

fr.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibylle de Vivonne est née en 1220, à Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Vivonne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mabel Malet, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Anselm de Gournay à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1316, à Bovey Tracey, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sibylle de Vivonne 1220 in Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Vivonne 26 und ihre Mutter Mabel Malet 25. Sie hat in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Anselm de Gournay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1316 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Bovey Tracey, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Vivonneが1220年にイギリスノーフォルクウエルズ ネクスト ス セアで生まれた時，父Hugh de Vivonneは26歳，母Mabel Maletは25歳であった。イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンでAnselm de Gournayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1316年にイギリスデボンボビー トレイセイで96歳で死去した。

ko.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Sibylle de Vivonne(이)가 1220년 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Vivonne(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Malet(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 Anselm de Gournay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1316년 영국 데폰 보비 트라스이에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Anselm de Gournay em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1316, em Bovey Tracey, Devon, Inglaterra, com 96 anos.

ru.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibylle de Vivonne родилась в 1220 г. в местности веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Vivonne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Malet, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anselm de Gournay в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1316 г. в местности бови треиси, девон, Англия в возрасте 96 лет.
